title: SBA
description:
ScreamingBedwars Addon
Addon made for lovers of a certain popular server that adds shops, Team Upgrades, titles, npcs, scoreboards and more!
body:
Features:
- Improved parties (/p open, /p private)
- Spawner hologram now supports all material
- Custom spawner upgrade event
- Adventure mode spectator to better reflect popular server
- All new features are optional
- Easier multishop support
- Quickbuy item slots
- Major bug fixes
- Custom traps
- Improved scoreboard for less flickering and Geyser support
- Custom enchants for all items
- Open store command to have shops via NPC plugins
- Permanent Armor - saving player armor stats on death and loading them in after respawn cooldown
- Auto Equips armor for you after purchase
- Gives players wooden sword at start of the game
- Permanent Sword and Armor [TEAM] Enchantments
- Prevent Player from dropping swords.
- Store like prices from a certain popular server
- EventListeners so that Players can't unequip Armor
- Downgrade Pickaxe and Axe each time player dies!
- Disable certain inventory movements and putting certain items in chest
- Purchase and purchase fail messages
- Team Upgrades store!
- Improved team upgrade shop to be like a certain popular server's upgrades
- Scoreboard system!
- Tab and player prefixing
- Disabled Armor and swords breaking
- Custom Titles
- Games Inventory GUI!
- Party System!
- Party Chat
- Automatic Spawner Upgrades
- Lobby Scoreboard!
- Shout Command!
- Blindess Trap!
- Heal Pool!
- Floating Rotating Generators
- Custom Death Messages
- Custom Kill Messages
- Custom Bed Destroyed Messages
- Complete Armor Invisibility!
- Fireball/TNT jumping!
- Generator Splitting!
- Introduce Language files!
- Fully configurable GamesInventory
- Fully rewritten Party System
- Custom limits for each Tier of Diamond/Emerald generators
- Added health under Nametag and PlayerList
- Custom TabList Header And Footer in MainLobby!

USAGE:
- Add this command to get the teamupgrades store working
/bw admin (mapname) store add TeamUpgrades upgradeShop.yml false

- Add this command to get the normal store working
/bw admin (mapname) store add Store shop.yml false

To use games inventory GUI the following commands you need to add to the npc.

- /sba gamesinv spawnnpc solo
- /sba gamesinv spawnnpc double
- /sba gamesinv spawnnpc triple
- /sba gamesinv spawnnpc squad

Party System:
To use the party system just invite someone onto your party using /p invite and wait for the player to accept your request. Once the player accepts, if you're the party leader you can join games and the players of your party will be automatically added to your game.

commands
- /party invite <playerName> -- Invites player to your party
- /party kick <playerName> -- kicks player from party
- /party disband -- deletes party
- /party accept -- accepts party request from another player
- /party decline -- declines current request.
- /party leave -- leaves current party
- /party open -- make a public party that doesn't require invite
- /party private -- make private games that only your party can be in

Make sure you have java11+ installed before reporting bugs

Statistics (brand new)
https://bstats.org/plugin/bukkit/SBA/14804

Found a unique bug?, report them here:
https://github.com/boiscljo/SBA/issues

**ALL YOUR ARENAS MUST HAVE THE GOLD, EMERALD, IRON AND DIAMOND SPAWNERS.

NOTE:
- The upgrade store lacks a few features, but that will be added on in a later update.

- The floating generators currently requires spawner-holograms to be disabled in the bedwars config, you cannot use both settings together. Either disable spawner-holograms or disable floating-generators.
